channel.title: Claude Code Live Cheatsheet
channel.description: Auto-updating cheatsheet for Claude Code — keyboard shortcuts, commands, tips, and more.

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.139 highlights
item.description:
• Agent view: `claude agents` lists every CC session (v2.1.139)
  • /goal command: set completion condition, Claude works until met (v2.1.139)
  • Hook args: string[] exec form and continueOnBlock for PostToolUse (v2.1.139)
  • CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR now passed to MCP stdio servers (v2.1.139)
  • API key disables Remote Control, /schedule, claude.ai MCP, notifications (v2.1.139)
  • /scroll-speed command: tune mouse wheel speed with live preview (v2.1.139)

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.139
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [slash-commands] /goal [condition]: Set completion condition; Claude works across turns until met
+ [slash-commands] /scroll-speed: Tune mouse wheel scroll speed with live preview
+ [keyboard-shortcuts] { / }: Jump between user prompts (transcript view)
+ [keyboard-shortcuts] ?: Show keyboard shortcuts (transcript view)
+ [cli-flags] claude agents: Agent view — list every CC session (running/blocked/done)
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin details <name>: Show plugin component inventory and projected token cost
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR: Project dir passed to MCP stdio servers and hooks env
+ [config-env] args: string[]: Hook exec form — spawn directly without shell
+ [config-env] continueOnBlock: PostToolUse: feed rejection reason back to Claude, continue turn
+ [mcp-servers] ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}: Reference project dir in MCP server commands
+ [workflows-tips] API key → no cloud: API key disables Remote Control, /schedule, claude.ai MCP, notifications
- [keyboard-shortcuts] Ctrl V
- [keyboard-shortcuts] P
- [slash-commands] /cost
- [slash-commands] /team-onboarding
- [config-env] wslInheritsWindowsSettings
- [config-env] CwdChanged
- [config-env] FileChanged

Full changelog

• Added agent view (Research Preview): a single list of every Claude Code session — running, blocked on you, or done. Run `claude agents` to get started. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-view
• Added `/goal` command: set a completion condition and Claude keeps working across turns until it's met. Works in interactive, `-p`, and Remote Control. Shows live elapsed/turns/tokens as an overlay panel
• Added `/scroll-speed` command to tune mouse wheel scroll speed with a live preview
• Added `claude plugin details <name>` to show a plugin's component inventory and projected per-session token cost
• Added transcript view navigation: `?` for keyboard shortcuts, `{`/`}` to jump between user prompts, `v` to toggle shortcut panel
• Added hook `args: string[]` field (exec form) that spawns the command directly without a shell, so path placeholders never need quoting
• Added hook `continueOnBlock` config option for `PostToolUse` — set to `true` to feed the hook's rejection reason back to Claude and continue the turn
• MCP stdio servers now receive `CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` in their environment, matching hooks. Plugin configs can reference `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}` in commands
• Compaction prompt now asks the model to preserve sensitive user instructions
• `/mcp` Reconnect now picks up `.mcp.json` edits without a restart, and shows the HTTP status and URL when reconnecting fails
• `/context all` per-skill token estimates now account for the model's tokenizer and show rounded values
• `claude plugin install <name>@<marketplace>` now auto-refreshes the marketplace and retries before reporting a plugin as not found
• `/plugin` installed-plugin details now show hook event names and MCP server names cleanly
• `/context` now shows the providing plugin's name for plugin-sourced skills
• Remote MCP server reconnect retry on transient failures is now enabled for all users
• API requests from subagents now carry `x-claude-code-agent-id` / `x-claude-code-parent-agent-id` headers, and `claude_code.llm_request` OTEL spans include `agent_id` / `parent_agent_id` attributes
• Remote Control, `/schedule`, claude.ai MCP connectors, and notification preferences are now disabled when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` / `apiKeyHelper` / `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` is set, even if a Claude.ai login also exists. Unset the API key to use these features
• Fixed a deadlock where expired credentials and the `forceRemoteSettingsRefresh` policy setting blocked `claude auth login`/`logout`/`status` with no way to recover
• Fixed `autoAllowBashIfSandboxed` not auto-approving commands with shell expansions like `$VAR` and `$(cmd)`
• Fixed a bug where a hook writing to the terminal could corrupt an on-screen interactive prompt; hooks now run without terminal access
• Fixed unbounded memory growth when an HTTP/SSE MCP server streams non-protocol data — response bodies now capped at 16 MB per SSE frame
• Fixed `Skill(name *)` permission rules — the wildcard form now works as a prefix match, matching `Bash(ls *)` behavior
• Fixed settings hot-reload not detecting edits to symlinked `~/.claude/settings.json`
• Fixed plugin details failing to load when the marketplace key differs from the manifest name
• Fixed `/model` picker "Default" row not reflecting `ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL`/`ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL` overrides
• Fixed spurious "stream idle timeout" 5 minutes after a response completed, caused by the watchdog timer not being cleared on stream cancellation
• Fixed silent `exit 1` when 10+ MCP servers are configured and the cache directory is unwritable — the error message now includes the underlying cause
• Fixed a typing cursor blinking on tab names, list pointers, and select rows in dialogs
• Fixed transcript view letter shortcuts not working after mouse click
• Fixed Bash-mode up-arrow history repeating the first entry and clobbering the in-progress draft
• Fixed pasting or dropping multiple images only inserting the last one
• Fixed hyperlinks using unreadable dark navy on dark themes — they now adapt to the active theme
• Fixed model picker showing a redundant "Current model" row for third-party users whose model is set to the `opus` alias
• Fixed legacy Opus picker entry on PAYG 3P providers resolving to the same model as the default entry
• Fixed mouse wheel scrolling speed in Cursor and VS Code 1.92–1.104; the trackpad now scrolls at a steady rate and the mouse wheel keeps ~3 lines per notch
• Fixed scroll behavior in Windows Terminal and VS Code when attached to background sessions
• Fixed MCP resources from disconnected servers lingering in `@server:` autocomplete
• Fixed two-file diff snippets over-reporting the number of truncated lines by one
• Fixed Grep results not relativizing Windows drive-letter paths and count mode reporting wrong totals for single-file paths
• Fixed border-embedded text overflowing on CJK/emoji due to visual cell width miscalculation
• Fixed fuzzy-match highlighting splitting emoji and astral-plane characters mid-pair
• Fixed skill argument names containing regex metacharacters breaking argument substitution
• Fixed ProgressBar rendering a full block for an almost-full fractional cell
• Fixed task polling and `fs.watch` being resurrected when the last subscriber leaves while a fetch is in flight
• Fixed plugin dependency resolution leaving a stale count when the manifest name differs from the source identifier
• Fixed Insights Time-of-Day chart skewing when a session has an unparseable timestamp
• Fixed keybindings using only the cmd/super/win modifier being flagged as unparseable
• Fixed `claude_code.active_time.total` OpenTelemetry metric not being emitted in `--print` mode
• Fixed `claude plugin update` not preserving cross-plugin symlinks inside a marketplace
• [VSCode] Press Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+T to reopen the most recently closed session tab, configurable via `claudeCode.enableReopenClosedSessionShortcut`

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.138
item.description:
Full changelog

• Internal fixes

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.137
item.description:
Full changelog

• [VSCode] Fixed extension failing to activate on Windows

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.136
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] autoMode.hard_deny: Block unconditionally regardless of user intent or allow exceptions
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY_FOR_OTEL: Re-enable session quality survey for OTEL enterprises
- [config-env] forceRemoteSettingsRefresh
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.133
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] worktree.baseRef: fresh|head — base branch for worktrees (default changed)
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_EFFORT: Current effort level in hooks and Bash tool
~ [skills-agents] ${CLAUDE_EFFORT}: Current effort level (skills, hooks, Bash tool)
- [config-env] blockedMarketplaces
- [config-env] strictKnownMarketplaces

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.132
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID: Session ID in Bash tool subprocess env
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN: Opt out of fullscreen alternate-screen renderer
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.129
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] --plugin-url: Fetch plugin .zip archive from URL for session
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT: Force synchronized output (Emacs eat etc.)
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE: Auto-update on Homebrew/WinGet installations
+ [config-env] skillOverrides: Control skill visibility: off/user-invocable-only/name-only
- [config-env] prUrlTemplate
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PERFORCE_MODE
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.128
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] --plugin-dir: Load plugin from directory or .zip archive
+ [mcp-servers] workspace: Reserved server name — existing servers skipped with warning
~ [slash-commands] /color [color]: Set prompt-bar color; bare = random

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.126
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] claude project purge [path]: Delete all CC state for project; --dry-run, -y, -i, --all
~ [cli-flags] --dangerously-skip-permissions: Skip all prompts; catastrophic rm still prompts ⚠️

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.123
item.description: Minor updates

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.122
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER: Select Bedrock service tier (default/flex/priority)
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_HIDE_CWD

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.121
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [mcp-servers] alwaysLoad: Skip tool-search deferral for server tools
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin prune: Remove orphaned auto-installed plugins
~ [config-env] PostToolUse: After tool executes (duration_ms; can replace output)

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.120
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] claude ultrareview [target]: Run /ultrareview non-interactively; --json for raw
+ [skills-agents] ${CLAUDE_EFFORT}: Current effort level in skill content

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.119
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] prUrlTemplate: Custom code-review URL for footer PR badge
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_HIDE_CWD: Hide working directory in startup logo
+ [config-env] PostToolUseFailure: After tool fails (duration_ms included)
+ [cli-flags] --from-pr: Load PR/MR from GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket/GHE URLs
~ [config-env] PostToolUse: After tool executes (duration_ms included)
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT
- [config-env] "defer" decision

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.118
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [keyboard-shortcuts] v / V (vim mode): Visual / visual-line mode with selection
+ [config-env] ~/.claude/themes/: Custom theme JSON files
+ [config-env] wslInheritsWindowsSettings: WSL inherits Windows managed settings
+ [config-env] autoMode.$defaults: Extend built-in auto mode rules instead of replacing
+ [config-env] DISABLE_UPDATES: Block all update paths including manual
+ [config-env] mcp_tool type: Invoke MCP tool directly from hook
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin tag: Create release git tag for plugin
~ [slash-commands] /cost: Alias for /usage (cost tab)
~ [slash-commands] /usage: Usage stats, cost, and rate status
- [config-env] MCP_CONNECTION_NONBLOCKING
- [config-env] ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H
- [config-env] showThinkingSummaries
- [config-env] refreshInterval
- [config-env] hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.117
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] blockedMarketplaces: Block plugin marketplaces (managed)
+ [config-env] strictKnownMarketplaces: Only allow known marketplaces (managed)
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT: Enable forked subagents on external builds
+ [skills-agents] mcpServers: Load MCP servers for agent session
- [config-env] autoMemoryDirectory
- [config-env] disableSkillShellExecution
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.116
item.description: Minor updates

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.114
item.description: Minor updates

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.113
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] sandbox.network.deniedDomains: Block domains even when allowedDomains wildcard permits
+ [keyboard-shortcuts] Ctrl+E: Move to end of line (multiline input)
- [config-env] autoScrollEnabled
- [keyboard-shortcuts] B

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.112
item.description: Minor updates
